calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-22-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/P. Dias, CSR. Lois Jones.
Petitioner, Cartel Plycia Nycoy present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to Prettyboy.
Decree signed in open court.
